predictions.title: GGUF supply chains are the new battleground.
predictions.body: **GGUF supply chains are the new battleground.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (Jinja2 SSTI through GGUF, RCE) makes visible the fact that "model files themselves are carriers of executable code." By Q3 2026, Hugging Face / Ollama Library / ModelScope will require model-card + chat_template signature verification or sandboxed execution as a baseline; Foundry Local / Bedrock / vLLM will enable SSTI scanning by default at GGUF load time. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
predictions.summary: **GGUF supply chains are the new battleground.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (Jinja2 SSTI through GGUF, RCE) makes visible the fact that "model files themselves are carriers of executable code." By Q3 2026, Hugging Face / Ollama Library / ModelScope will require model-card + chat_template signature verification or sandboxed execution as a baseline; Foundry Local / Bedrock / vLLM will enable SSTI scanning by default at GGUF load time.

predictions.title: The era of "exclusive alliance between hyperscaler and frontier lab
predictions.body: **The era of "exclusive alliance between hyperscaler and frontier lab"** is here. Amazon-Anthropic's 10-year $100B commit becomes the second "hardware-codesigned + platform-exclusive" contract after MS-OpenAI. Through H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect the **5-pole regime** — Google–(in-house Gemini), Anthropic–AWS, OpenAI–MS, Meta–internal (Llama), xAI–Oracle/NVDA — to lock in. Trainium / TPU / MAIA / MI300X design differences will translate directly into model-behavior differences, and developers will reassess **backend portability** (a runtime-agnostic layer like MCP) as a hard requirement. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
predictions.summary: **The era of "exclusive alliance between hyperscaler and frontier lab"** is here.

predictions.title: Proprietary re-expansion against an open-weight geopolitical split.
predictions.body: **Proprietary re-expansion against an open-weight geopolitical split.** Qwen3.6-Max-Preview's "proprietary, API-only" pivot, alongside Anthropic's staged gating of Mythos Preview, makes Q3 2026 the moment **"strongest model = closed weights"** crystallizes. Open weights, meanwhile, concentrate on the 35B-A3B / Bonsai / Llama lines for production, formalizing the line: local for utility, cloud for the frontier. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
predictions.summary: **Proprietary re-expansion against an open-weight geopolitical split.** Qwen3.6-Max-Preview's "proprietary, API-only" pivot, alongside Anthropic's staged gating of Mythos Preview, makes Q3 2026 the moment **"strongest model = closed weights"** crystallizes.
